_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. Never commit config.json. All values here are overridden by server2/.env when present — prefer .env for new deployments.
_comment_hub_state_db: Required for dev/test instances. Use a distinct name per environment to avoid collisions (e.g. behdashtik_hub_state_dev for dev, behdashtik_hub_state for prod).
